forward.description: A ComputeNode hosts one or more GPUDevice instances physically installed in it.

reverse.description: A GPUDevice is hosted by the ComputeNode in which it is physically installed.

forward.description: A ModelVersion was trained on one or more Datasets used as training data.

reverse.description: A Dataset trains one or more ModelVersions that consumed it during training.

forward.description: A TrainingRun produces exactly one ModelVersion as its output artifact.

reverse.description: A ModelVersion was produced by exactly one TrainingRun that created it.

forward.description: A TrainingRun runs on one or more ComputeNodes that provide GPU compute resources.

reverse.description: A ComputeNode runs one or more TrainingRuns that execute on its GPU resources.

forward.description: An Alert triggers an Incident that groups related alerts into a single operational event.

reverse.description: An Incident is triggered by one or more Alerts that collectively identified the problem.

forward.description: An Incident affects one or more ComputeNodes whose availability or health is impacted.

reverse.description: A ComputeNode is affected by one or more Incidents that impact its normal operation.

forward.description: An EvaluationResult evaluates a specific ModelVersion on a benchmark.

reverse.description: A ModelVersion is evaluated by one or more EvaluationResults across different benchmarks.

forward.description: A DataPipeline produces one or more Datasets as its primary output artifacts.

reverse.description: A Dataset is produced by the DataPipeline that generated or populated it.

forward.description: A DataPipeline consumes one or more Datasets as input data sources for its transformations.

reverse.description: A Dataset is consumed by one or more DataPipelines that read it as an input source.
